raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija tas Kehnînsch;/
un ſapulzinaja wiſſus Juha un
Jerusaletmes Wezzajns.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnînsch gahje
us augſchn ta KUNGA Nam-
mâ/ lihôs ar wiſſeem Wihreem
no Juha un Jerusaletmes Ge-
dſihwotajeem/ ir ar teem Pree-
ſtereem un Lewiteem/ un wiſſeem
Laudim / tik labbi leeleein ka
maseem/ un preeſch winna Au-
fim tappê laffiti wiſi Derribas
Wahrdi/ no tahs Grahmatas/
kas ta KUNGA Namma atra-
ſta tappusi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnînsch ſtahwe-
ja ſawa Weetâ/ un darrija wee-
nu Derribu preeſch to KUNgu/
ka bij tam KUNGAM pakkat
ſtaigahit/ un winna Bautlus /
un winna Leezibus/ un winna
Likkumus turreht no wiſſas ſa-
was Sirđs/ un no wiſſas ſawas
Dwehfeles/ un tohs Derribas
Wahrdis padarrhiht/ kas ſchiuni
Grahmata rakſiti irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tur ſtahweja wiſſi/
kas Jerusaletme/ un eekſch Ben-
jamina atrasti tappê/ un tee Je-
rusaletmes Gedſihwotaji darrija
pehz Deewa fawu Tehwu Dee-
wa Derribas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Uu Josijus atnehme wiſ-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "pe tee no ta KUNGA fa
Tehwu Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXXV. Nodalla.
Josjus turr tam KUNGAM tohs Pa
Swehtkus: 1. Kaṙro prett Warati N
to Egiptes Rehninu: 20. Tohp Rausch
lihôs Mahwei eewainohts: 23. Pee
winſch arridjan mirſt: 24. Un tohp fir
noschchlohts: 25.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "B Ehz turreja Josijus ta
KUNGAM tohs Pa
fa Swehtkus Jerusa-
imê/ un tee nokawe to Baſſ
(Jehru) zettorta padeſmi
Deena pirma Mehnes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winſch eczeble tob
Preeſterus ſawas Wattis/ u
eedrohſchinaja tohs pee ta KUN-
GA Namma Kalpoſchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winſch tazzija us teet
Lewiteein/ kas wiſſu Israē-
malzija/ kas tam KUNGAM
fwechti bija. Leezeet to fwecht
Schkirſtu tai Namma/ ko Sa-
lamans Dahwida Dehls tas I
fraēta Kehnînsch irr ustaiſijs
kas jums us Kamfscheem ne iv
janefs/ tad nu kalpojeet tan
KUNGAM juhfu Deewam/u
winna Israēta Laudim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un toifajtees pehz juhf
Tehwu Nammeem pehz juhf
Kahrtahm/ itt ta Dahwids ta
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
